allow: Bash(sqlite3 build/dict.sqlite "SELECT d.name, COUNT\(*\) FROM dictionaries d JOIN entries e ON e.dict_id=d.id GROUP BY d.id;")
Bash(sqlite3 build/dict.sqlite "SELECT d.name, e.headword FROM entries_fts f JOIN entries e ON e.id=f.rowid JOIN dictionaries d ON d.id=e.dict_id WHERE entries_fts MATCH 'dharma' LIMIT 5;")
Bash(sqlite3 build/dict.sqlite "SELECT count\(*\) FROM entries e JOIN dictionaries d ON d.id=e.dict_id WHERE d.name='mahavyutpatti';")
Bash(sqlite3 build/dict.sqlite "SELECT e.headword_norm, e.headword FROM entries e JOIN dictionaries d ON d.id=e.dict_id WHERE d.name='mahavyutpatti' LIMIT 10;")

Bash(sqlite3 build/dict.sqlite "SELECT e.headword_norm, substr\(e.body,1,100\) FROM entries e JOIN dictionaries d ON d.id=e.dict_id WHERE d.name='mahavyutpatti' AND e.headword_norm LIKE 'chos%' LIMIT 5;")
Bash(sqlite3 build/dict.sqlite "SELECT count\(*\) FROM entries_fts WHERE entries_fts MATCH 'headword_norm:chos';")
Bash(sqlite3 build/dict.sqlite "SELECT count\(*\) FROM entries_fts WHERE entries_fts MATCH 'headword_norm:chos*';")
Bash(sqlite3 build/dict.sqlite "SELECT count\(*\) FROM entries_fts f JOIN entries e ON e.id=f.rowid JOIN dictionaries d ON d.id=e.dict_id WHERE entries_fts MATCH 'headword_norm:\\"chos\\"';")
Bash(sqlite3 build/dict.sqlite "PRAGMA page_size; PRAGMA page_count; PRAGMA integrity_check;")
